ValveResourceFormat CLI redistribution inventory
================================================

Upstream release
----------------

ValveResourceFormat / Source2Viewer-CLI 19.2.6339, tag 19.2, commit
c72208352f5bf62f1482447ed166c548f303f8fa.

Official release assets used by CS2FOW:

- cli-windows-x64.zip
  SHA-256 53e7e8dac1ddd876078346de709c8dbe613a967e94cd0c969aa34c61ec07680d
- cli-linux-x64.zip
  SHA-256 30d86dfd72bf35c8a38015c81bd92f0b04b1f49304e73a5d734c875803b2685b

The Windows package redistributes these upstream asset files:

- Source2Viewer-CLI.exe
- TinyEXRNative.dll
- blake3_dotnet.dll
- libSkiaSharp.dll
- spirv-cross.dll

The Linux package redistributes these upstream asset files:

- Source2Viewer-CLI
- libblake3_dotnet.so
- libSkiaSharp.so
- libspirv-cross.so

The upstream libTinyEXRNative.so is deliberately removed from the Linux
package. Source2Viewer-CLI is a self-contained .NET 10.0.8 single-file
application; its embedded runtime is covered by dotnet-10.0.8.LICENSE and
dotnet-10.0.8.THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.

Restored CLI package graph
--------------------------

This is the complete NuGet graph restored from the 19.2 source for win-x64.
Packages that share one upstream project share its license file below.

- Blake3 2.0.0: Blake3.LICENSE
- ConsoleAppFramework 5.7.13: ConsoleAppFramework.LICENSE
- K4os.Compression.LZ4 1.3.8: K4os.Compression.LZ4.LICENSE
- KeyValues2 0.8.0: KeyValues2.COPYING
- SharpGLTF.Core 1.0.6: SharpGLTF.LICENSE
- SharpGLTF.Runtime 1.0.6: SharpGLTF.LICENSE
- SharpGLTF.Toolkit 1.0.6: SharpGLTF.LICENSE
- SkiaSharp 3.119.2: SkiaSharp.LICENSE and SkiaSharp.THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES
- SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Linux.NoDependencies 3.119.2: same SkiaSharp files
- SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.Win32 3.119.2: same SkiaSharp files
- SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.macOS 3.119.2: restored but not redistributed
- System.IO.Hashing 10.0.5: dotnet-10.0.8.LICENSE and
  dotnet-10.0.8.THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES
- TinyBCSharp 0.1.2: TinyBCSharp.LICENSE
- TinyEXR.NET 0.3.11: TinyEXR.NET.LICENSE
- ValveKeyValue 0.70.0.499: ValveKeyValue.LICENSE
- ValvePak 4.0.0.142: ValvePak.LICENSE
- Vortice.SPIRV 1.0.5: Vortice.LICENSE
- Vortice.SpirvCross 1.5.4: Vortice.LICENSE
- ZstdSharp.Port 0.8.7: ZstdSharp.LICENSE

Native and embedded notices
---------------------------

- BLAKE3 native code: included in Blake3.LICENSE.
- Skia and its native dependencies: SkiaSharp.THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.
- SPIRV-Cross native code: SPIRV-Cross.LICENSE.
- TinyEXR native code: TinyEXR.LICENSE and TinyEXR.NOTICE.
- zlib used by TinyEXR: zlib.LICENSE.
- zstd native code used by ZstdSharp: zstd.LICENSE.
- Embedded Roboto subset: Roboto.NOTICE and the Apache 2.0 terms reproduced
  in SPIRV-Cross.LICENSE.
- ValveResourceFormat itself: ValveResourceFormat.LICENSE.

The cgltf source compiled directly into cs2fow_baker is separate from the VRF
CLI graph and is covered by ../cgltf.LICENSE in source packages and by
licenses/cgltf.LICENSE in binary packages.
